package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for create_and_update_share_same_dto_despite_conflicting_requiredness: A single DTO reused for create and update when validation rules clearly differ.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule018NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule018NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule018NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario018Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule018NegativeService, input Rule018NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
